other_observers: Tony Leukering; Originally found by Cole Wild at Cattail Pond, Larimer, on 9 Nov 2004. The bird spends time at Cattail Pond and Ryan Gulch Lake.
description: Very large, white waterfowl dwarfing all other waterfowl on the lake. Pure white, except for some rusty coloration on the head and neck. Eyes black. Bill solidly black, large, straight, with the angle of the upper mandible on the same plane as the forehead so that there was no break in angularity. The base of neck curved backwards "resting" on the bird's back.Behaviors: Swimming with other waterfowl.Call: None heard.Plumage: adult
